scripts.dev: concurrently -n sidecar,server,client,tunnel -c magenta,blue,green,yellow "npm start --prefix sidecar" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "node scripts/tunnel.js"
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -n sidecar,server -c magenta,blue "npm start --prefix sidecar" "npm start --prefix server"
